entries.title: Wag Creek
entries.description: Wag Creek is creating a unique adoption experience on 180 acres of peaceful, natural land where potential adopters can spend meaningful time with rescue dogs in a calm, beautiful setting, helping people and dogs truly connect. The sanctuary offers cozy canine bonding cabins, scenic trails, and even spaces for mindfulness and enrichment. With a focus on health, well-being, and organic farm-grown food, Wag Creek ensures every dog is supported on their journey to a forever home. This is an adoption experience like no other, it’s about building trust, understanding, and a lasting bond.

entries.title: Freedom Dog Co
entries.description: Freedom Dog Co. is a California-based, foster-driven 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to rescuing and rehoming dogs in need. By operating through a network of loving foster homes, they provide temporary care, rehabilitation, and socialization for dogs until they find their forever families. Thier mission is to promote compassion, reduce pet overpopulation, and ensure every dog has the opportunity to live a happy, healthy life.
